chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ الْخَمْرَ لَمْ تَزَلْ مُحَرَّمَةً
chapter_title.en: Chapter 14 – The wine will never cease to be Prohibited

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/250)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/250)
text: هُ قَالَ مَا بَعَثَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ نَبِيّاً قَطُّ إِلَّا وَ فِي عِلْمِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَنَّهُ إِذَا أَكْمَلَ لَهُ دِينَهُ كَانَ فِيهِ تَحْرِيمُ الْخَمْرِ وَ لَمْ تَزَلِ الْخَمْرُ حَرَاماً إِنَّ الدِّينَ أَنَّمَا يُحَوَّلُ مِنْ خَصْلَةٍ إِلَى أُخْرَى فَلَوْ كَانَ ذَلِكَ جُمْلَةً قُطِعَ بِهِمْ دُونَ الدِّينِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Ibrahim Bin Umar Al Yamani,

Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> has said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic did not Send a Prophet<sup>as</sup> at all except it was in the Knowledge of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> that He<sup>azwj</sup> would be Completing the Religion for him<sup>as</sup>, and in it is the Prohibition of the wine, and the wine will not cease to be unlawful. The Religion rather, changes from one characteristic to another, and had that been in its entirety (all the characteristics at once), they (people) would cut off to be without the Religion’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Ibrahim ibn ‘Umar al-Yamaniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ’Every time Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, sent a Prophet it was in the knowledge of Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, that in the case of completing His religion wine must have been made unlawful. It had to remain unlawful, however, religion is to change the habits one after the other. Were such change to take place all at once, people would boycott religion as a whole.’”
